productDisplayName: Red Tape Men Black Formal Shoes
description: Formal dressing gets better with these slip-on leather shoes from red tape. The tapered toe box and cutting edge look complement all semi-formal and formal wear. The design creates a perfect foundation for building a well-groomed look that exudes style and confidence. Upper Leather upper with a smooth finish for maximum durability, comfort and style Tapered toe with a long tongue for comfort and style Leather heel cup for enhanced protection to the backfoot Slip-on style for easy use Stitch detailing to enhance shoe life Leather collar for in-step comfort Fabric inner lining and padded fabric footbed for breathability and all-day comfort Midsole Rubber midsole for lightweight comfort and impact protection Outsole TPU outsole used in the forefoot and heel for comfort and grip on various surfaces Grooves on the forefoot with a stacked heel Shoe care Wipe surface with dry, clean cloth to remove dust Use a branded leather conditioner to maintain shoe shine Do not store in direct sunlight
